decisions.rationale: The observation's own base_record_id, corridor_webster-ave-bronx, already represents the same physical corridor entity — Webster Avenue in the Bronx proposed for Select Bus Service with offset bus lanes. The existing registry record for corridor_webster-ave-bronx already includes the source 2012_10_brt_webster_cac3_meeting_summary in its source list, and its payload (corridor_name: 'Webster Avenue Corridor', borough: Bronx, description: 'Proposed SBS corridor in the Bronx based on the existing Bx41 route') describes the same real-world entity. Per decision rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — never 'link' to one's own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting #3 Summary
the proposed corridor design – offset bus lanes - was selected
conceptual designs for offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue
